scripts.build: liferay-npm-scripts build && esbuild src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/js/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/__liferay__/index.js --external:react --external:react-dom --loader:.tsx=tsx --jsx=transform --banner:js="import * as React from 'react';" --target=es2020
